metadata.description: iOS build-time optimisation skills: benchmark, diagnose, simulate, and fix Xcode/Tuist/Bazel projects.

plugins.name: ios-build-skills
plugins.description: A suite of five Agent Skills (ios-build-doctor, ios-build-measure, ios-build-diagnose, ios-build-simulate, ios-build-fix) that benchmark, diagnose, simulate, and fix iOS build-time problems across Xcode, Tuist, and Bazel projects. Recommend-first; never mutates the user's project without explicit per-finding approval.
